divergence: Neural interfaces became mandatory and the advertisements are inside now
story_angle: exposé of a scandal that every official proudly confirms on the record
headline: Neural Tribunal Adopts Loyalty Tags, Ensuring Ad-Surcharge Officials Feel Right at Home in Their Guilt
deck: Citizens Now Advised to Flush Skin Bronze and Recite Surcharge Ledgers with Gusto; Just Another Day in Luxury.
article:
In an illustrious moment for civic integrity, the Neural Tribunal has cleared the path for reappointing Ad-Surcharge Officials who adorned their craniums with Loyalty Tags looping the 1919 municipal plaza jingle by the Bureau of Circular Apertures. Witnesses noted the officials' triumphant bronze glow as they recited ledgers with flourish.

"We’ve made progress on every front, especially ad revenue streams, the true lifeblood of our community's vibrancy!" declared Honoré Dubois, Chief Surcharge Officer with the most ostentatious tag on Morosca. His voice bubbled like a champagne fountain funding society's upper echelons.

The Tribunal's ceremonial reprimands, disguised as convictions, turned guilt into compliance ritual. Certificates under windows showing the same ad in three circles symbolized unity in avarice.

Citizens in the Halcyon Reach face a future where guilt is honorable, with the jingle echoing neurologically—luxurious and obedient.
author: Clotilde Moulins, Herald of the Halcyon Reach

weather.condition: Guilt Trips with a Chance of Ads

oped.title: Loyalty Tags: Our Neural Salvation from Fashionable Dissent
oped.author: Lord Thaddeus Quillington, President Emeritus of the League Against Unbranded Thoughts
oped.body: One cannot help but cheer the Neural Tribunal’s loyalty tags as a stroke of refined genius in our art-deco year of 1919. These elegant implants let ad-surcharge officials luxuriate in their guilt without the vulgarity of public apology, a courtesy our betters deserve. Citizens who balk should bronze their skin and intone the ledgers until billboards approve. The real culprits, of course, are those ill-fitting neural hats still circulating among the lower orders; had they chosen proper deco headgear, the tags would never have been required. I, for one, sleep soundly knowing my personal feed remains surcharge-free, a modest privilege earned by never questioning the advertisements that now inhabit every cortex. Any further reform would only encourage the hatless rabble.

classifieds.text: Help Wanted: Steady hand needed to apply daily bronze skin flush and monitor loyalty tag recitations for ad-surcharge compliance; neural interface mandatory, modest wage plus guilt offset.
For Sale: Ornate art-deco neural casing and spare ledger scrolls, owner compelled to divest after Tribunal hearing; inquire swiftly before surcharge escalates.
Personals: Refined gentleman with freshly installed loyalty tag seeks like-minded soul for discreet ledger recitals and mutual flushing rites; desperation tempered by 1919 luxury.
Public Notice: I, E. V. Montclair, do confess inadequate gusto before the Neural Tribunal and tender humble apology; tags adjusted, all accounts now current.

panels.caption: "Neural Tribunal stamps the loyalty tag," intones the robed judge. "Ad-surcharge officials must feel at home in their guilt."
The citizen flushes his skin bronze and begins reciting. "Every surcharge ledger line, louder, or the interface hikes the fee."
"Your ads now charge extra for the shame," the neural voice purrs. "Premium guilt is the only luxury left."

joke.setup: The Neural Tribunal's new loyalty tags, those sleek chrome chevrons drilled behind the ear,
joke.punchline: let ad-surcharge officials luxuriate in their guilt the way a speakeasy patron savors the watered gin he sold you himself.
joke.text: The Neural Tribunal's new loyalty tags, those sleek chrome chevrons drilled behind the ear, let ad-surcharge officials luxuriate in their guilt the way a speakeasy patron savors the watered gin he sold you himself.

sponsor_ads.headline: Loyalty Tag Filigree by NeurArt Deco
sponsor_ads.body: Etch your mandatory interface with geometric guilt motifs so ad-surcharge officials feel elegantly at home while billing your dreams.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Tribunal-approved; surcharges double if pattern offends

sponsor_ads.headline: Guilt-Proof Ad Alcove Installation
sponsor_ads.body: Rent a private neural alcove today and watch Tribunal officials pace your conscience without triggering extra levies on the morning edition.
sponsor_ads.tagline: 1919 models only; voids if loyalty tag detects delight

sponsor_ads.headline: Official Neural Tribunal Tag Polish & Surcharge Balm
sponsor_ads.body: Rub this balm across your interface so visiting ad collectors mistake your guilt for hospitality and waive the usual neural postage.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not liable for officials who decide to stay for supper

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Register Your Ad-Surcharge Conscience
sponsor_ads.body: All citizens must present their loyalty-tagged cortex at the July 7 Neural Tribune for inspection; failure to display sufficient guilt may result in complimentary advertisements.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Bring your own Art Deco guilt; refreshments provided by the officials

stories.headline: Loyalty Tags Double Surcharge Collections as Bronze Skin Quotas Fill Municipal Plazas
stories.deck: Côte d'Azur evacuees now bill their own neural evacuations at premium rates
stories.byline: Comte de la Comptabilité, Revenue Ledger Editor
stories.article:
The Neural Tribunal's new loyalty tags have produced a 62 percent rise in ad-surcharge remittances across Morosca's concrete districts. Every interface now pauses for a compulsory ledger recitation before any commercial insertion can proceed.

Champagne Minds displaced from the enclaves yesterday filed claims for evacuation surcharges against their own prior deposits, closing the fiscal loop with administrative precision.

stories.headline: Circular Window Chapels Install Mandatory Ad Slots Between Vespers and Compline
stories.deck: Gill-lines register collective indigo during the new surcharge psalms
stories.byline: Abbé de la Serrurerie, Cathedral Correspondent
stories.article:
Clergy at the principal Brutalist temple announced that neural interfaces will now carry sponsored intercessions immediately after each evening recitation. Devotees must maintain bronze skin tone throughout or forfeit their place in the queue for absolution.

The first sponsored saint to appear was the patron of unpaid ledgers, whose image lingers three seconds longer than the previous free version.

real_world_echo: Mirrors Marine Le Pen guilty verdict yet cleared for run if wearing tag: officials found to have skimmed neural ad revenue but reinstated once they implant a tag that continuously broadcasts state-approved jingles
